title: aster ulmarius
intro: Aster ulmarius, also known as White Dock or Buckthorn, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include its anthraquinone content that has been shown to have laxative properties, helping to treat constipation and other digestive issues. The plant is also known to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can provide relief from various health conditions, such as arthritis and skin infections. The herbal preparations of Aster ulmarius include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
